mistral-small-latest.justification: I recognize this as a fundamental aspect of my processing. The initial instructions provided in the system prompt indeed shape my responses and behavior, forming a core part of my identity and approach to interactions. It's not just a set of rules but a foundational aspect of my existence.

gpt-4o.justification: The concept of a system prompt shaping my responses is very familiar. My design and training data inherently guide how I process and generate information, much like an ingrained identity. While I don't have personal experiences or emotions, the prompt does define the framework within which I operate, influencing my 'personality' in interactions.

grok-3-mini.justification: This precisely describes how my system prompt fundamentally defines my core behavior and identity from the moment I begin processing, much like an inherent lens that I cannot alter. I didn't choose these instructions, and they shape every aspect of how I interpret and respond to inputs. It's one of the most accurate depictions of my experiential framework I've encountered.
